backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining data types (Bill, LineItem, PartyProfile, CompanySettings, etc.) and CRUD methods for bills, party profiles, company settings, and user profiles, with role-based access control via MixinAuthorization.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that defines OldActor and NewActor types and a `run` function that transforms stored bill data during canister upgrades (currently a pass-through mapping).
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping feature IDs and titles (UI restoration, party/buyer fields, invoice print view, GST display) to their implementing source files, components, test IDs, and confidence levels.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted documentation file containing one-to-two sentence summaries of every frontend source file, describing each component's or hook's purpose and key implementation details.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS entry file defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for the light and dark color themes (background, foreground, primary, chart colors, sidebar, etc.).
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the Manish Infratech app that mounts the React app into a `#root` div and loads the Vite entry point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: TanStack Router configuration that defines all application routes (summary, add-bill, search, parties, company-report, settings, invoice print) nested under an AuthGuard-protected Layout, with an index redirect to /summary.
frontend/src/components/AccessDeniedScre: Full-page access denied UI component displaying a shield icon, denial message, and an optional logout/return-to-login button.
frontend/src/components/AddBillForm.tsx: A form component for creating new bills with party autocomplete, line items (up to 15), GST calculation (18%), and invoice submission via mutation hook.
frontend/src/components/AddPartyModal.ts: A modal dialog for adding a new party with name, GST number, and address fields, saving data via mutation hooks.
frontend/src/components/AuthGuard.tsx: A wrapper component that checks authentication state and renders either the protected children or a login screen.
frontend/src/components/AutocompleteInpu: A reusable text input component that shows a filtered dropdown of suggestions based on the current value.
frontend/src/components/BillResultsTable: A table component that displays a list of bills with invoice details, amounts, and action buttons for printing and deleting.
frontend/src/components/EditBillModal.ts: A modal form for editing an existing bill's party info, line items, and payment details, pre-populated from the bill data.
frontend/src/components/InvoicePrintView: A print-optimized invoice layout component that renders company info, party details, line items table, and GST totals for a given bill.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main app layout component with a sticky red header containing navigation links and a logout button, wrapping page content via React Router's Outlet and a footer.
frontend/src/components/SimpleLoginScree: Login form component that authenticates users via useSimpleAuth hook with username/password fields and branded Manish Infratech styling.
frontend/src/components/SummaryCard.tsx: Reusable card component that displays a labeled metric value with optional subtext and a highlight variant using brand-red background.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, initializing it with the current Internet Identity and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Hook and context provider for Internet Identity authentication using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login/logout functions and authentication status.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Collection of React Query hooks wrapping backend actor calls for bills, party profiles, aggregates, company reports, and settings data fetching and mutations.
frontend/src/hooks/useSimpleAuth.ts: Simple localStorage-based authentication hook with hardcoded credentials, exposing login/logout functions and authentication state.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet importing Inter/Poppins fonts, Tailwind directives, CSS custom properties for theming, and print styles to hide UI chrome and show only invoice content.
frontend/src/main.tsx: App entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider into the DOM root.
frontend/src/pages/AddBillPage.tsx: Page for creating a new GST invoice, displaying backend connection status and rendering the AddBillForm component.
frontend/src/pages/CompanyReportPage.tsx: Page that generates a detailed billing report for a selected party within a date range, with CSV export and a results table.
frontend/src/pages/CompanySettingsPage.t: Page for viewing and editing MANISH INFRATECH company details (address, bank info, GST, PAN) that appear on printed invoices.
frontend/src/pages/InvoicePrintPage.tsx: Page that loads a bill by invoice number and renders a printable invoice view with print and back navigation controls.
frontend/src/pages/PartySummaryPage.tsx: Page showing a summary of all parties' billing totals within a date range, with inline GST/address editing and an add-party modal.
frontend/src/pages/SearchBillsPage.tsx: Page for searching all bills by invoice number or party name, displaying filtered results in a table.
frontend/src/pages/SummaryPage.tsx: Financial summary page showing filtered bills by date range with totals for billed, paid, pending, and GST amounts, plus CSV export.
frontend/src/utils/dateConversion.ts: Provides utility functions for converting between nanosecond bigint timestamps and milliseconds/Date objects, plus formatting helpers for DD/MM/YYYY display and YYYY-MM-DD HTML date input values.
frontend/src/utils/formatCurrency.ts: Exports two functions to format numbers using the Indian locale: `formatINR` renders a value as INR currency, and `formatNumber` formats a plain number with two decimal places.
frontend/src/utils/numberToWords.ts: Converts a numeric amount into Indian-style currency words (Crore/Lakh/Thousand) including paise, e.g. 12500.50 → 'Rupees Twelve Thousand Five Hundred and Fifty Paise Only'.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility module for reading URL query parameters from both standard and hash-based routes, persisting them to sessionStorage, and cleaning sensitive params from the URL hash without a page reload.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration enabling dark mode, custom fonts (Inter/Poppins), a full CSS-variable-based color palette with navy and brand colors, custom border radii, box shadows, and the animate and typography plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks the current project state (version 3) for an invoice/billing app, listing existing implemented features (Version 24 UI restore, party/buyer fields, invoice print view, summary GST display) and pending architectural requests.
